error_signature: The service is receiving too many requests from you
title: HTTP Request fails due to rate limiting
symptom: When making multiple HTTP requests in quick succession, n8n throws a 'too many requests' error. This prevents further requests from being processed.
applies_when: Making multiple requests in a short time
not_this_if: Requests are spaced out properly according to API limits
root_cause: The API being called has a rate limit of 60 requests per minute. If requests exceed this limit, the API responds with a 429 error, indicating that the client is sending too many requests too quickly.
fix_steps: Adjust the batching settings in the HTTP Request node to include a longer interval between requests, such as 10000ms.
Test the workflow again to ensure it no longer hits the rate limit.
agent_instruction: Increase the batch interval to 10000ms in the HTTP Request node settings.
